name: tiptap
description: Helps coding agents integrate and work with the Tiptap rich text editor. Use when building or modifying a rich text editor with Tiptap, installing Tiptap extensions, or implementing features like collaboration, comments, AI, or document conversion.

interface.shortDescription: Helps coding agents integrate and work with the Tiptap rich text editor
interface.longDescription: Helps coding agents integrate and work with the Tiptap rich text editor. Use when building or modifying a rich text editor with Tiptap, installing Tiptap extensions, or implementing features like collaboration, comments, AI, or document conversion.
defaultPrompt: Help me use Tiptap for my current task.
